{{CargoRelic
|name=Thundos' Sculpture
|class_id=20735
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=Upon learning of Thundos' fall, Earth's Will had a batch of statues crafted in the likeness of its head. One purpose was to commemorate the historic moment of triumph over a formidable foe, and the other was to bestow them upon those exceptional Travelers, allowing them to share in the Joy of victory!
|fame=15
|art=12
|fth=33
|civ=13
|tech=17
|ss1=Snail Leadership +1<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail ATK +50<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
|ss2=Snail Leadership +2<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail ATK +100<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
|ss3=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail ATK +150<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
|ss4=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail ATK +150<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
|ss7=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail ATK +150<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8<br> (Awakened)
}}
